docs.text: Warning This library is in early development and is not production-ready. Use at your own risk. Cardano N2N Client What is Cardano N2N Client? A simple(r) Cardano node-to-node client library in Haskell, wrapped around the cardano-node libraries. This library allows you to connect to a Cardano node using the node-to-node protocol and perform chain synchronization. Terminal window.addEventListener("load", function(event) { AsciinemaPlayer.create("/cardano-n2n-client/assets/asciinema/bootstrap.cast", document.getElementById("asciinema-player-0"), { cols: 80, rows: 24, autoPlay: false, preload: false, loop: false, startAt: "0:00", speed: 1.0, theme: "asciinema", fit: "width", controls: "auto", pauseOnMarkers: false, terminalFontSize: "small", terminalFontFamily: "", terminalLineHeight: 1.33333333, }); });
